title: Decorators
description: A collection of utility components that provide visual enhancements and functional decorations for other UI components. These components include clear buttons, close buttons, color indicators, full-screen toggles, generic content containers, headings, and icons.

sections.title: Clear Button
sections.description: A button component that allows users to clear or reset a value. Automatically integrates with clearable parent components.

sections.title: Close Button
sections.description: A button component that displays a close icon and triggers an action when clicked. Integrates with closable parent components.

sections.title: Color Indicator
sections.description: A visual indicator that displays a color preview. Useful for color pickers and color selection interfaces.

sections.title: Full Screen Button
sections.description: A toggle button that switches between full-screen and normal view modes.

sections.title: Generic Content
sections.description: A flexible component for various UI elements like footer, header, content, divider, form hints, prefix, suffix, text, title, subtitle, placeholder, and overlay.

sections.title: Heading
sections.description: A styled heading component with customizable color, weight, and dark mode support.

sections.title: Icon
sections.description: A component for displaying various types of icons.

props.name: icon
props.description: The icon displayed on the clear button.

props.name: closeAll
props.description: Determines whether the button should close all items or just the current one.

props.name: icon
props.description: The icon class to be applied to the button.

props.name: previewColor
props.description: The color value to display in the indicator.

props.name: isActive
props.description: Indicates whether the full-screen mode is currently active.

props.name: darkMode
props.description: Enables or disables dark mode styling for the heading.

props.name: color
props.description: The surface color type for the heading.

props.name: weight
props.description: The font weight of the heading.

props.name: icon
props.description: Specifies the icon to be displayed.
